signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in prior months but below 2.4% forecasts | YES | MED confidence** [1]

This March figure, reported by Trading Economics, marks the latest confirmed data point amid global energy volatility from the Iran conflict, with core pressures contained near the Bank of Korea's 2% target.[1] The Bank of Korea held its benchmark rate at 2
